title: space_invite_set sends create:null instead of omitting when input is None
description: Trigger: caller calls space_invite_set with input=None (destroy-only). Bad behavior: create_map is set to serde_json::Value::Null, so the wire sends create:null. RFC 8620 5.3 specifies create as an optional Id[Object] map; sending null instead of omitting the key may cause a strict server to reject the request with invalidArguments. Fix: when input is None, omit the create key entirely from args using conditional insertion.
